commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Codex app-server protocol JSON canonicalizer so typed-object array sorting only applies under `oneOf`, and updates the focused script test for order-sensitive arrays.

PR surface: Tests +18, Other +10. Total +28 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the canonicalizer sorts every array by type when possible, which can reorder non-`oneOf` typed-object arrays before this PR.
commands.review_followup: - No repair lane is needed: this maintainer-labeled PR has no discrete automated fix request and should proceed through normal maintainer review plus CI/Testbox proof.

target.title: fix: preserve non-oneOf protocol schema array order
target.body:
## Summary

- Address ClawSweeper feedback from #91507 by making Codex protocol JSON array sorting context-aware.
- Restrict typed-object array sorting to `oneOf` only.
- Preserve item order for `anyOf`, `prefixItems`, generic typed arrays, `enum`, `required`, and other arrays while still recursively canonicalizing object keys.
- Add focused regression coverage proving `prefixItems` order is preserved.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/codex-app-server-protocol-source.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs scripts/lib/codex-app-server-protocol-source.ts test/scripts/codex-app-server-protocol-source.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- generated JSON parse + canonical stability check over `extensions/codex/src/app-server/protocol-generated/json/**/*.json`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean: no accepted/actionable findings

Blocked locally:

- `pnpm codex-app-server:protocol:check` fails before comparison because local Cargo/libgit2 tries to load missing Homebrew `llhttp` `libllhttp.9.3.dylib`.
target.author: romneyda
